description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with a cartoonish design, featuring a prominent image of Donkey Kong's face framed in gold on one side. The barrel is reinforced with two metallic-looking horizontal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom. Around the upper circumference, bold red and yellow text spells out 'DONKEY KONG' with a star motif, giving it a playful and themed appearance. The top surface displays a 'no hands' warning sign, suggesting it is not meant to be opened or tampered with. The wood texture is stylized, with visible grain and a slightly weathered look, while the metallic bands have a matte, slightly rough finish. This barrel is likely intended as a decorative or thematic object for urban parks, playgrounds, or entertainment venues.
description: A stylized wooden barrel with metallic bands, Donkey Kong graphics, and a 'no hands' warning sign on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing Donkey Kong's face in a gold frame and part of the 'DONKEY KONG' text.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the 'KONG' text and metallic banding, with wood grain visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the 'G D' portion of the text and uninterrupted wood texture.
description_view_3: Side view showing 'DONKE' text and partial Donkey Kong face, with metallic banding.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: Donkey Kong graphics, 'no hands' warning sign, red and yellow text
